vibe: Elegant, subtractive, authoritative, and spacious. Focuses on typographic tension and clean structural grids.

typography.install_instructions: Add Google Fonts imports for 'Cormorant Garamond' (weights 300, 400, 600) and 'Manrope' (weights 400, 500, 600) to index.css or tailwind config.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Subtractive Design. The empty areas spotlight what truly matters.

buttons.primary: bg-[#111111] text-white hover:bg-[#333333] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-body text-sm tracking-wide uppercase
buttons.secondary: border border-[#111111] text-[#111111] hover:bg-[#F3F1ED] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-body text-sm tracking-wide uppercase

cards.style: bg-[#F3F1ED] border border-border p-8 md:p-12 rounded-none shadow-none

chat_mockup.container: bg-white border border-border rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm flex flex-col gap-4 max-w-md mx-auto relative
chat_mockup.user_bubble: bg-[#F3F1ED] text-text_primary p-4 rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm text-sm self-end max-w-[85%]
chat_mockup.ai_bubble: bg-[#111111] text-white p-4 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm text-sm self-start max-w-[85%]

images.description: Abstract minimal soft white gradient background for the hero section.
Fashion model editorial image to accompany the clothing/jewellery industry showcase.
Modern living room white interior image for the furniture industry showcase.
Clean office supplies desk image for the office supplies industry showcase.
Skincare beauty products minimal image for the beauty industry showcase.
Abstract minimalist art for the Catalog Enrichment offering card.
Elegant data visualization for the Intent-Aware Knowledge Graph offering card.

logos.instructions: Use standard typographic layouts for partner/founding team logos (IIT, BITS, META, MICROSOFT, UBER, VISA, CISCO). Style them as uppercase, heavy tracking (tracking-widest), text-sm, text-text_secondary/60 font-semibold to act as subtle monochrome trust marks.

sections_instructions.hero: Full height or min-h-[90vh]. Use 'hero_background' as a subtle absolute background image covering the section. Large Serif H1. Clear mission statement about SuperSearch. Primary CTA 'Get Started' or 'Book Demo'.
sections_instructions.stats: A high-contrast bar across the screen or a 4-col grid displaying the 4 key stats (58%, 4x, 35%/doubled, 82%). Use massive typography for the numbers (Cormorant Garamond) and small uppercase overlines for the description.
sections_instructions.industry_showcase: Implement a tabbed interface. Tabs on the left or top (Fashion, Furniture, Office, Beauty). When a tab is clicked, show the respective image alongside an interactive chat mockup. Chat mockup must display the exact user query from the prompt and a skeleton/shimmer AI response.
sections_instructions.global_reach_callout: Use a marquee (react-fast-marquee) or a massive typography block: 'CATERING TO EVERY COMPANY ACROSS EVERY INDUSTRY'.
sections_instructions.offerings: 3-column grid. Each card represents an offering: 1) AI Shopping Assistant, 2) Catalog Enrichment (use image), 3) Intent-Aware Knowledge Graph (use image). Cards should be airy, #F3F1ED background, subtle hover effects.
sections_instructions.founding_team: Simple, elegant section 'Built by alumni from:'. Display the text-based logos in a responsive flex/grid layout, muted and aligned.
sections_instructions.pricing_and_contact: Split section or two sequential blocks. Highlight 'Most competitive pricing on the market'. A highly customized, elegant Shadcn form for Contact (Name, Company, Email, Message) with a stark black submit button.

accessibility_and_interactions.testing: All interactive elements, buttons, tabs, form inputs MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='hero-cta'`, `data-testid='tab-fashion'`).
accessibility_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons and links must have distinct, accessible hover states.
accessibility_and_interactions.motion: Use framer-motion for subtle fade-ups on scroll. Keep it sophisticated and slow (duration: 0.8s, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1]).
